name_en: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. It features enlarged classic quilting and a chain strap design, retaining the classic while upgrading practicality and comfort! The name '19' comes from time, just like the 2.55, so you know it was born in 2019. It also covers Coco Chanel's birthday. Imported goatskin, fine and soft texture, feels fluffy when held.
